finding_refs.assertion_text: ATV:TREM2, an antibody engineered with a monovalent transferrin receptor (TfR) binding site, exhibits improved brain biodistribution compared to a standard anti-TREM2 antibody following peripheral delivery in mice.
ATV:TREM2 enhances TREM2 signaling in the brain compared to a standard anti-TREM2 antibody following peripheral delivery in mice.
TREM2 variants represent the strongest genetic risk after ApoE4
TREM2 loss-of-function increases amyloid plaque density
